column1: Incorporated in the year 1943, Radico Khaitan is one of the most recognised IMFL (Indian Made Foreign Liquor) brands in India. [1] The company was initially known as Rampur Distillery Company and was focussed on distillation and bottling for branded players  and canteen stores of armed forces. Later on in  the year 1997, Radico Khaitan  ventured into its own branded IMFL products and launched its first brand  8PM whisky which became its millionarie brand within a year of its launch. [2]
